---
title: "Translating On-Farm Data into Decisions — McKean Conference 2025 & PigCHAMP Feature"
description: |
  Reflections from the 2025 ISU James D. McKean Swine Disease Conference and our Spring 2025 PigCHAMP Benchmark Magazine publication on leveraging production data to enhance sow efficiency.
author: "Elly Kirwa"
date: "2025-07-10"
categories: [Data Analytics, Sow Efficiency, Swine Production, Research]
sidebar: false
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 2
---

Great opportunity to interact with producers and veterinarians during the **2025 ISU James D. McKean Swine Disease Conference**, presenting on leveraging production data to enhance sow efficiency and inform evidence-based management strategies.

## What We Presented

Our work focuses on translating routinely collected on-farm data into actionable insights — moving beyond simple reporting toward integrated analytics that connect biological performance with economic outcomes.

Key themes:

- How lactation feeding patterns relate to subsequent farrowing success
- The role of sow and litter characteristics in predicting efficiency metrics
- Building benchmark dashboards that help producers identify at-risk animals before problems compound

## PigCHAMP Benchmark Magazine Feature

This work was also featured in the **Spring 2025 edition of the PigCHAMP Benchmark Magazine** (pp. 6-7).

> [Read the article](https://www.pigchamp.com/flipbooks/benchmark-magazine/2025/USA/4/index.html)

## Reflections

I am grateful for the opportunity to contribute to the translation of on-farm data into actionable insights that support sustainable, data-informed decision-making in the swine industry.
